allow: Bash(git commit -aqm 'Remediation loop in written parts + graded unit review *)
Bash(git commit -aqm 'Speech debug view + credit the matched guess \(not the top one\) *)
Bash(git commit -qm 'Add the free CHED First-1000 Waray words PDF + extracted text + outcome *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Revise structure to hybrid: can-do unit titles, spiral, sizing model *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Extract course data from code; add multi-course support *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add rapid-fire Waray STT tester + space-insensitive matching *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Tighten STT containment: cap phantom-syllable gap at 2 chars *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add expanded Frequency curriculum reference \(every lesson + glosses\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Fix church word: iglesia -> simbahan \(native Waray, from '\\''simba'\\''\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add phrase-expansion proposal \(mined from sources, for review\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add lesson-retool proposal: explicit Words vs Apply/Mastery split *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Lock lesson-retool decisions: 1-step Apply, phrases-only review, free nav *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Retool lessons: explicit Words vs Apply, phrases in theme units *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add phrase-coverage table: words vs phrases + uncovered words per unit *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add phrase recording sheet: English prompt per uncovered word *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Vary recording-sheet prompts: rotate frames, recycle known vocab *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add Phrase Studio \(voice phrase capture\) + c→k STT fold *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Phrase Studio: add '\\''Doesn'\\''t make sense'\\'' flag button *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Rebuild prompts from known-vocab pools \(i+1\) + add reinforcement table *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Fix reinforcement table: key on each unit'\\''s NEW words + count all words *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add Duolingo-vs-Waray vocabulary comparison table *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add Duolingo gap triage: ADD/SKIP/already-have lists for review *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add 22 common words from the Duolingo gap list to Frequency *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add hands-free voice mode + retool Needs-Work drill *)
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\\? <Mic size=\\{16\\} \\/> : <Pencil size=\\{16\\} \\/>/? <Mic size={16} \\/> : <Keyboard size={16} \\/>/g' src/sulog.jsx)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Voice mode polish: keyboard icon \(not pencil\) + speech-debug on wrong answers *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Home unit legend: add the red '\\''Needs work'\\'' bucket *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Log STT false-negatives + voice-mode stuck-verdict bug \(deferred\) *)
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/## Known voice-mode UI bug \\\(separate from matching\\\)/## Voice-mode UI bug — FIXED 2026-06-24/' docs/stt-marked-wrong-log.md)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Fix voice-mode stuck card: judge on last interim if no final result *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Log false-negative #2: '\\''I'\\''m sorry'\\'' for Pasensya na \(English phrasing\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Log capture-timing issue: mic clips first ms of speech \(onstart cue fix\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Fix voice MC: pick closest-matching option, not first loose match *)
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/## Capture timing — mic clips the first few ms of speech/## Capture timing — mic clips the first few ms of speech \(FIXED 2026-06-24\)/' docs/stt-marked-wrong-log.md)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Voice mode: cue speaking on live audio capture \(fixes clipped word starts\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Unify voice input: same circle orb on MC as on type cards *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'New lessons always teach with the full 4-step ladder \(produce-only is review-only\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Voice MC always resolves to a verdict \(no more dead-end on a near-miss\) *)

Bash(perl -i -pe 's{docs/sources/waray-frequency\\.json \\\(full data: word -> \\{count, inSeed, inChed\\}\\\)}{docs/sources/waray-lexicon.json \(normalized: sources, lexemes, cards, sentences\)}' tools/build-frequency.mjs)
Bash(perl -i -pe 's{Full list in waray-frequency\\.json\\.}{Full lexicon in waray-lexicon.json.}' tools/build-frequency.mjs)

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./docs/sources/waray-lexicon.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(d.meta.counts\)\); console.log\('sample lexeme:', JSON.stringify\(d.lexemes[20]\)\); console.log\('sample card \(phrase\):', JSON.stringify\(d.cards.find\(c=>!c.single\)\)\); console.log\('sample sentence:', JSON.stringify\(d.sentences[1200]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const {STORIES}=require\('./src/courses/waray/stories.js'\); const ids=STORIES.map\(s=>s.id\); const dup=ids.filter\(\(x,i\)=>ids.indexOf\(x\)!==i\); console.log\('stories:',STORIES.length,'| duplicate ids:', dup.length? dup : 'none'\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {STORIES} from './src/courses/waray/stories.js'; const ids=STORIES.map\(s=>s.id\); const dup=ids.filter\(\(x,i\)=>ids.indexOf\(x\)!==i\); console.log\('stories:',STORIES.length,'| duplicate ids:', dup.length? dup : 'none'\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {STORIES} from './src/courses/waray/stories.js'; const w=STORIES.filter\(s=>s.questions\); console.log\('stories with questions:',w.length\); const b=STORIES.find\(s=>s.id==='bloom-an-bao'\); console.log\('An Bao titleEn:',b.titleEn,'| Qs:',b.questions.length,'| q0:',b.questions[0].q\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {STORIES} from './src/courses/waray/stories.js'; const w=STORIES.filter\(s=>s.questions&&s.questions.length\); console.log\('stories with questions:',w.length\); const b=STORIES.find\(s=>s.id==='bloom-an-bao'\); console.log\('An Bao → titleEn:',JSON.stringify\(b.titleEn\),'| Qs:',b.questions.length\); console.log\('q0:',b.questions[0].q,'opts:',b.questions[0].options.length,'ans:',b.questions[0].answer\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {GLOSS} from './src/courses/waray/stories.js'; console.log\('ada →', JSON.stringify\(GLOSS['ada']\)\); console.log\('pagyakan →', JSON.stringify\(GLOSS['pagyakan']\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./docs/sources/waray-lexicon.json'\); for\(const id of ['ni','kan','hi']\){const l=d.lexemes.find\(x=>x.id===id\); console.log\(id,'→', l?JSON.stringify\({gloss:l.gloss,inDeck:l.inDeck,top1000:l.top1000,freq:l.freq}\):'NOT IN LEXICON'\);}")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {GLOSS} from './src/courses/waray/stories.js'; console.log\('ni →', JSON.stringify\(GLOSS['ni']\)\); console.log\('kan →', JSON.stringify\(GLOSS['kan']\)\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {STORIES} from './src/courses/waray/stories.js'; const k=STORIES.filter\(s=>/kandiwata/i.test\(s.title\)\); k.forEach\(s=>console.log\('✓', s.source,'·', s.title,'·', s.license,'·', s.paras.length,'paras', s.titleEn?\('· EN: '+s.titleEn\):''\)\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {STORIES} from './src/courses/waray/stories.js'; const by={}; STORIES.forEach\(s=>by[s.source]=\(by[s.source]||0\)+1\); console.log\('reader stories by source:', JSON.stringify\(by\)\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on\("data",d=>s+=d\).on\("end",\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(s\).results||[];for\(const b of r\){console.log\("Bloom page:  https://bloomlibrary.org/book/"+b.objectId\);console.log\("Read online: "+decodeURIComponent\(b.baseUrl\).replace\(/\\/$/,""\)+"/index.htm"\);}}\);')
